message:
fix(events): use EventTime over deprecated LastTimestamp; sort multi-cluster events as time (#6053)

Fixes #6042, #6043.

#6042: LastTimestamp is deprecated in favor of EventTime (events.k8s.io/v1).
Modern kubelets only populate EventTime, leaving LastTimestamp as the zero
metav1.Time{}. Reading it directly caused recent events to appear at the
Unix epoch and sort incorrectly. Introduce k8s.EffectiveEventTime() which
prefers EventTime and falls back to LastTimestamp then FirstTimestamp for
backwards compatibility with older clusters. Replace .LastTimestamp
references across client_resources.go and workloads.go.

#6043: Multi-cluster event merging in mcp_cluster.go sorted by the LastSeen
RFC3339 *string* via lexicographic comparison, which breaks across
timezones, empty values, and format drift. Introduce
k8s.SortEventsByLastSeenDesc() which caches parsed time.Time values and
sorts by instant.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,6 @@ package handlers
 import (
 	"context"
 	"log/slog"
-	"sort"
 	"sync"
 
 	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
@@ -281,10 +280,10 @@ func (h *MCPHandlers) GetEvents(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
 
 			waitWithDeadline(&wg, clusterCancel, maxResponseDeadline)
 
-			// Sort by timestamp (most recent first) and limit total
-			sort.Slice(allEvents, func(i, j int) bool {
-				return allEvents[i].LastSeen > allEvents[j].LastSeen
-			})
+			// Sort by LastSeen parsed as time (most recent first).
+			// Lexicographic string compare is unreliable across timezones
+			// and empty values (see issue #6043).
+			k8s.SortEventsByLastSeenDesc(allEvents)
 			if len(allEvents) > limit {
 				allEvents = allEvents[:limit]
 			}
@@ -384,10 +383,10 @@ func (h *MCPHandlers) GetWarningEvents(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
 
 			waitWithDeadline(&wg, clusterCancel, maxResponseDeadline)
 
-			// Sort by timestamp (most recent first) and limit total
-			sort.Slice(allEvents, func(i, j int) bool {
-				return allEvents[i].LastSeen > allEvents[j].LastSeen
-			})
+			// Sort by LastSeen parsed as time (most recent first).
+			// Lexicographic string compare is unreliable across timezones
+			// and empty values (see issue #6043).
+			k8s.SortEventsByLastSeenDesc(allEvents)
 			if len(allEvents) > limit {
 				allEvents = allEvents[:limit]
 			}
